overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt traveling through a lush summer landscape. The character moves from an open flower-filled meadow into a shaded forest path and finally stops on a wooden bridge overlooking a turquoise river.

scene_state.functional_zone: open meadow with wildflowers and distant mountains

agents.ego_description: Geralt jogging steadily along the path through the flower-filled meadow

entered.detail: winding dirt trail through tall grass
clusters of bright red flowers lining the path
tall purple wildflowers on the right side of the trail
blue mountain range visible on the horizon
scattered trees marking the forest edge

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a bright, sunlit meadow filled with colorful wildflowers. Geralt moves along a dirt path toward a distant forest, with mountains visible in the background. The environment is open and expansive with clear skies overhead.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky forest entrance with shaded path

events.description: enters shaded forest area with rocky walls blocking direct sunlight

agents.ego_description: Geralt moving through the shaded rocky passage into the forest

entered.detail: large moss-covered boulders flanking the trail
thick tree cover blocking the sky ahead

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions into a shaded, enclosed forest entrance with rocky outcrops on both sides. The lighting becomes significantly darker as the canopy blocks the sun. The path narrows between mossy boulders and dense tree trunks.

scene_state.functional_zone: winding forest trail with dense undergrowth

agents.ego_description: Geralt following the winding path through the forest, navigating around trees and rocks

entered.detail: weathered wooden posts marking the path boundary
small wooden structure visible through the trees

segments.scene_description: The path continues through a dense forest with thick undergrowth and ferns. Dappled sunlight filters through the canopy. A wooden fence appears on the right side, and a distant cabin is visible through the trees on the left as the trail curves gently.

events.description: steps onto wooden bridge over bright turquoise water
stops in the middle of the bridge to look around at the river
resumes walking to cross the remainder of the bridge

agents.ego_description: Geralt pauses on the bridge to observe the turquoise river and rocky cliffs before continuing

entered.detail: rickety wooden planks spanning the river with rope railings
bright blue-green water flowing beneath the bridge
steep stone walls lining the river banks
cascading water visible downstream on the right

segments.scene_description: The character approaches and crosses a wooden footbridge over a striking turquoise river. He stops midway to look around at the water and rocky cliffs, then continues across. The bright blue water contrasts with the surrounding green forest and gray rocks.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a bright, expansive meadow into the depths of a shaded forest, eventually emerging at a vibrant river crossing. It begins on a sunlit dirt path surrounded by colorful wildflowers and distant mountains under a clear sky. As the camera advances, the open landscape narrows into a shaded forest entrance where the lighting dims and the path is hemmed in by mossy boulders and dense tree trunks. The scene then shifts through a thicket of ferns and undergrowth with dappled sunlight filtering through the canopy, passing a wooden fence and a distant cabin as the trail curves. Finally, the movement leads across a wooden footbridge where the character pauses to overlook a striking turquoise river set against a backdrop of gray rocky cliffs.
